summary: P1.5 (Proceeds Acquisition Constraints) and P2 (Frontend validation status UI, bulk resolution, queue grouping) features tested successfully. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend ValidationStatusPanel renders correctly in TaxSummaryDashboard with proper data display and interactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.5 and P2 features fully tested. ValidationStatusPanel integrated into TaxSummaryDashboard and working. All P2 endpoints verified: GET /api/custody/validation-status, GET /api/custody/beta/pre-export-check, GET /api/custody/review-queue/grouped, GET /api/custody/review-queue/suggestions, POST /api/custody/review-queue/bulk-resolve, POST /api/custody/fix/create-proceeds-acquisitions. Note: Bulk resolve was tested and resolved 323 review items, reducing blocking issues from 369 to 46.

features_verified.GET_validation_status: PASS - Returns validation status with user_id, is_valid, can_export
features_verified.GET_review_queue_suggestions: PASS - Returns wallet link suggestions with confidence levels
features_verified.POST_bulk_resolve: PASS - Resolves multiple items at once
features_verified.POST_create_proceeds_acquisitions: PASS - Creates proceeds acquisitions with dry_run support
features_verified.frontend_expand_collapse: PASS - Expand button shows detailed blocking issues
features_verified.frontend_refresh: PASS - Refresh button updates validation status
features_verified.frontend_quick_actions: PASS - Review Queue and Chain of Custody links visible

frontend_ui_verified.Blocking_Issues_display: FOUND - Shows count (46 after bulk resolve)
frontend_ui_verified.Unresolved_Reviews_display: FOUND - Shows count (0 after bulk resolve)
frontend_ui_verified.Blocking_Issues_details: Shows CRITICAL/HIGH severity with fix recommendations
